mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_post WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_post WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND is_visible = TRUE AND is_pinned = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_post WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY like_count DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_post WHERE author_type = #{userRoleType} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM site_post WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_post ( board_id, author_type, author_id, author_name, title, content, link_type, external_url, is_pinned, is_visible, is_deleted, view_count, comment_count, like_count, dislike_count, report_count ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{authorType}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{title}, #{content}, #{linkType}, #{externalUrl}, #{isPinned}, #{isVisible}, #{isDeleted}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{reportCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, link_type = #{linkType}, external_url = #{externalUrl}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET dislike_count = dislike_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET dislike_count = GREATEST(dislike_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET report_count = report_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_post SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
